phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy the combined UNESCO ticket
phrases.text_local: Kde si koupím kombinovanou vstupenku UNESCO?
phrases.cultural_note: Combined tickets are often sold directly at tourist information centers.

phrases.intent_en: Do you sell the PID regional transport pass
phrases.cultural_note: Tourist information centers in Central Bohemia commonly sell regional transport passes.

phrases.intent_en: How do I book a guided walking tour here
phrases.text_local: Jak si tady mohu rezervovat komentovanou procházku?
phrases.cultural_note: Walking tours can often be booked directly at the information counter on the spot.

likely_response.local: Řekněte mi datum a čas, hned vás zapíšu.
likely_response.translation_en: Tell me the date and time, I'll book you in right away.

responses.english: Tell me the date and time, I'll book you in right away.
responses.french: Řekněte mi datum a čas, hned vás zapíšu.

phrases.intent_en: When is the next Italian Court guided tour
phrases.text_local: Kdy je další prohlídka Vlašského dvora?
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours at historic sites often start on the hour.

likely_response.translation_en: At two o'clock in the afternoon.

responses.english: At two o'clock in the afternoon.
